releases.name: v3.3.0
releases.body:
> [!WARNING]
> **Only install official stable releases** (like this one). Do NOT install pre-releases or raw CI artifacts — pre-release builds use a different package name (com.tencent.ig) and cannot be upgraded to stable without uninstalling first.

> [!IMPORTANT]
> **Notification permission required.** BannerHub will prompt for the **Post Notifications** permission when you start your first Epic, GOG, or Amazon download. You must allow it to receive download progress and completion notifications. Without it, you will not be notified when downloads finish or fail.

## New since v3.2.0

### Background download service
- Downloads for Epic, GOG, and Amazon now run in a persistent foreground service — leaving the store screen no longer interrupts an active download
- A progress notification appears while downloading with a **Cancel** action; a completion notification fires when done
- Downloads started from either the game list or the detail screen both route through the service

### In-app download manager
- New **⬇** button in each store's header opens the cross-store download manager
- Shows live progress for all active downloads across Epic, GOG, and Amazon simultaneously
- Completed downloads are saved to a persistent library — rows show store badge, **Launch**, **Uninstall**, and **× remove**
- **Clear ✓** button to dismiss all completed entries at once

### Dashboard download shortcut
- The BCI quick-launch button on the BannerHub dashboard is replaced with a direct shortcut to the download manager
- Button shows a live red count badge (e.g. **⬇ 2**) when downloads are active, updating in real time as jobs start and finish — returns to plain **⬇** when idle

### Download manager bug fixes
- Uninstalling a game inside the download manager now immediately refreshes the game list on return — no more stale installed state
- Cancelling or erroring a download now correctly shows the **Uninstall** button on the detail screen so partial game folders can be cleaned up without reopening the screen
- GOG Launch from the download manager no longer closes the download manager activity
- Amazon Launch from the download manager now correctly sets the pending launch exe key

---

> **Community game configs:** [the412banner.github.io/bannerhub-game-configs](https://the412banner.github.io/bannerhub-game-configs)
> **858 games · 2,226 configs** — Growing collection of community-submitted Wine configs. Contributions welcome — every config shared helps others get their games running.

## Installation

Install the APK matching your device CPU:
- **arm64-v8a** — most modern Android phones (64-bit ARM)
- **x86_64** — x86 devices / some emulators

BannerHub can coexist with the original GameHub app (different package name).

## New since v3.0.0

### Full-screen game detail pages (GOG, Epic, Amazon)

releases.name: BannerHub v3.0.0
releases.body:
> ⚠️ **Install stable releases only.** Do not install pre-release builds or CI artifacts — they are untested snapshots used for development. Only stable releases (like this one) are debugged and verified across devices.

## New since v2.9.3

- **Config metadata** — exported configs now tagged with `app_source="bannerhub"` for community config site filtering and source-based purge

## Config Cross-Compatibility with BannerHub Lite

Configs exported from BannerHub are fully compatible with BannerHub Lite, and vice versa.

**Why it works:** Both apps are built on the same GameHub engine. Per-game Wine settings are stored in SharedPreferences under the same keys (`pc_g_setting<gameId>`). The Export feature reads those keys and writes them to a JSON file. The Import feature reads that same JSON and writes the keys back — the app that originally exported it doesn't matter.

**How to transfer:** Export a config in one app (saved to `/sdcard/BannerHub/configs/`), copy the JSON to the same folder on the device running the other app, then Import it from the game's settings menu. The same folder path is used by both apps intentionally so configs are found automatically without moving files.

The `app_source` field in the JSON is only used by the community config site to filter by origin — it has no effect on import behavior.

> 💬 **Community game configs:** Share and download per-game settings at [the412banner.github.io/bannerhub-game-configs](https://the412banner.github.io/bannerhub-game-configs). The library grows with every contribution.

## Installation

9 APK variants are built — pick the one matching your existing GameHub installation:

- **Normal / Normal(GHL)** — `banner.hub` / `gamehub.lite`
- **PuBG** — `com.tencent.ig`
- **AnTuTu / alt-AnTuTu** — `com.antutu.ABenchMark` / `com.antutu.benchmark.full`
- **PuBG-CrossFire** — `com.tencent.tmgp.cf`
- **Ludashi** — `com.ludashi.aibench`
- **Genshin** — `com.miHoYo.GenshinImpact`
- **Original** — `com.xiaoji.egggame`

Uninstall your existing GameHub before installing — BannerHub is signed with a different certificate and cannot update over the original.

releases.name: Bannerhub v2.9.3
releases.body:
> [!WARNING]
> **Only install official stable releases** (like this one). Do NOT install pre-releases or workflow artifacts — they are untested builds that may be unstable, crash, or corrupt your game configurations.

## New since v2.9.2

- **Fix: Export/Import Config showed 0 settings, 0 components for all games**
  Previously, the Export and Import Config buttons always reported `settings_count: 0` and `components_count: 0` in the JSON file. Root cause: the gameId was always passed as integer `0` instead of resolving to the correct SharedPreferences key. Now uses GameHub's own resolution logic — catalog games use their integer ID string (e.g. `"271590"`), locally-added games use their UUID string (e.g. `"local_5f129d63-..."`).

- **Fix: GOG Akamai CDN chunk URL construction**
  Chunk URLs with Akamai CDN endpoints were being built incorrectly, causing download failures for affected GOG titles.

- **Fix: Genshin Impact package name case**
  Corrected package name to `com.miHoYo.GenshinImpact` (mixed case) — the previous lowercase variant failed to detect the installed game.

---

> **Community Game Configs — [the412banner.github.io/bannerhub-game-configs](https://the412banner.github.io/bannerhub-game-configs)**
> **525 games · 1,071 configs** — Share and import community-tested configurations for your games. The library grows with every contribution — if a config works well for you, upload it and help others.

## Installation

Download the APK that matches your existing GameHub package name from the [latest release](https://github.com/The412Banner/bannerhub/releases/latest):

| APK | Package | App Label |
|-----|---------|-----------|
| `BannerHub-vX.Y.Z-Normal.apk` | `banner.hub` | BannerHub |
| `BannerHub-vX.Y.Z-Normal.GHL.apk` | `gamehub.lite` | BannerHub |
| `BannerHub-vX.Y.Z-PuBG.apk` | `com.tencent.ig` | BannerHub PuBG |
| `BannerHub-vX.Y.Z-AnTuTu.apk` | `com.antutu.ABenchMark` | BannerHub AnTuTu |
| `BannerHub-vX.Y.Z-alt-AnTuTu.apk` | `com.antutu.benchmark.full` | BannerHub AnTuTu |
| `BannerHub-vX.Y.Z-PuBG-CrossFire.apk` | `com.tencent.tmgp.cf` | BannerHub PuBG CrossFire |
| `BannerHub-vX.Y.Z-Ludashi.apk` | `com.ludashi.aibench` | BannerHub Ludashi |
| `BannerHub-vX.Y.Z-Genshin.apk` | `com.mihoyo.genshinimpact` | BannerHub Genshin |
| `BannerHub-vX.Y.Z-Original.apk` | `com.xiaoji.egggame` | BannerHub Original |

**Which APK do I need?**

If you do not already have any GameHub variant installed, use the **Normal APK** (`banner.hub`). It installs as a completely separate app alongside the official GameHub Lite — both can coexist. If you want BannerHub to take over the `gamehub.lite` package slot (e.g. so apps that launch GameHub Lite by package name launch BannerHub instead), use **Normal.GHL** — but you must **uninstall the official GameHub Lite first** since they share the same package name and have different signing certificates. If you want to use a specific GameHub variant for performance spoofing (e.g. PuBG or Genshin), pick the matching APK. **Be aware: performance spoofing variants push your device harder and generate significantly more heat. Do not use these variants without proper cooling and a clear understanding of what you are doing. Use at your own risk.**

All 9 variants can be installed simultaneously. All APKs are signed with AOSP testkey (v1/v2/v3).

> **Note:** You must uninstall your existing BannerHub build before installing a new release if the signing certificate changed. Data is not preserved across uninstall.

releases.name: Bannerhub v2.9.2
releases.body:
> ⚠️ **Only install stable releases** (like this one). Do NOT install pre-releases or CI artifacts — they are untested intermediate builds and may be broken or incomplete.

## New since v2.9.1

- **Fix: imported GPU driver now applies correctly at launch** — configs exported from other devices stored the GPU driver display label as the component name. On import this caused the EmuComponents lookup to fail silently, so the game launched without the GPU driver even though all other settings applied correctly. After downloading the GPU driver component, BannerHub now detects the actual registered component name from the filesystem and corrects the game settings entry automatically. Manual re-selection is no longer needed.
- **Fix: exported configs only include components selected for that game** — previously, all BannerHub-injected components a user had installed could appear in an exported config, prompting unnecessary downloads on import. Exports now only include components actually selected for the specific game being exported.

> 📋 **Community game configs — 364 configs across 227 games**
> Browse, download, and share per-game Wine/DXVK/component configurations at **[the412banner.github.io/bannerhub-game-configs](https://the412banner.github.io/bannerhub-game-configs/)** — the community grows with every contribution.

## Installation

Download the APK matching your GameHub package name:

| APK | Package |
|-----|---------|
| `BannerHub-v2.9.2-Normal.apk` | `banner.hub` (fresh install / standalone) |
| `BannerHub-v2.9.2-Normal.GHL.apk` | `gamehub.lite` |
| Other variants | PuBG / AnTuTu / CrossFire / Ludashi / Genshin / Original |

All 9 variants can coexist simultaneously. The **Normal APK** installs alongside official GameHub Lite without conflict.

---

*To those celebrating Easter this weekend — Happy Easter! To everyone else, hope you're having a great Sunday regardless.*

THIS CACHE IS VERY OLD AND ONLY SUITABLE FOR OLD GAMES... GAMES MAY NOT RUN PROPERLY.

- Added Inject Document Provider (MT Manager)

- Removed GPU Option in Container Properties

- Changed the default language to English
- Changed the default renderer to VirGL
- Changed the GALLIUM_HUD variables
- Added Some Container Icons

- Added Custom Controls and New VirGL UI

CACHE CHANGES:
- PulseAudio libraries has been removed
- Removed "sbin, sys, run, root, proc, cron, rsyslog, log, cache" and many other files/libs
- Removed many __useless__ libraries (40MB reduced)
- Added Old 7Zip v19.00 and installed by default
- Added Adobe Flash Player Standalone for .swf games
- Added IrfanView v4.6.0 as default
- Changed Compressor from WinRAR to 7Zip
- Added 50 WineD3D DLLs to choose
- Added Many DSOAL + OpenAL alternatives
- Added Mesa VirGL v4 renderers
- Added Benchmarking Tools
- Added PhysX Legacy and AGEIA PhysX fix for old games
- Fixed file icons from Hugo
- Pre-Installed Input Bridge 0.1.9.9

SYSTEM32 CHANGES:
- Added DirectX & Codecs missing dlls
- CoreFonts will be installed by default
- Added DirectShow, DirectPlay dlls and some fixes
- Added bink32.dll in system32 version 1.99a
- Added Visual C .NET dlls 2002/2003
- Added Miles Sound System dll in system32
- Added WinG/GDI plus dlls for old games
- Added d3dto8 wrapper
MORE CHANGES ARE UNLISTED.

releases.name: May 12, 2026
releases.body:
**Repo archived.**

The goal of this repo was to build applications and share the latest updates from the developer, because he did not directly release apk.
That has now changed and apk are now downloadable directly from his repo, in the form of artifacts, which can be found in actions. (login required). Thanks everyone for your attention.

Fixed graphical response of pressing the button by coffincolors.
The controller will _not_ work with this version.
Set box64-0.4.1-fix, wowbox64-0.4.1-fix, fexcore-2601 and turnip-26.0.0 by StevenMXZ as default.

Use apk's at your own risk.

 Can maximize GPU utilization on certain devices. (needs further testing).

releases.name: v1.3.2
releases.body:
Fixes:
- Notification action "Exit" not terminating service when not in focus. - @LossyDragon @oxters168
- Proper fix for library padding crash from 1.3.1 hotfix. - @LossyDragon
- Left pane in a 2-Pane layout should fill the width properly (Library and Friends list) - @LossyDragon
- Hide keyboard when pressing search/enter button. - @LossyDragon
- Fix family shared games missing from library list @LossyDragon @oxters168

Additions:
- New app icon/logo by @Prowi3 Huge THANK YOU for this awesome icon!
- Apply new icons for Pluvia. - @LossyDragon @oxters168
- Expose some debug options in Settings. - @LossyDragon
- Friends list now shows game names. - @LossyDragon
- "Family" filter item for library list - @LossyDragon

Dependency Updates: 
- JavaSteam 1.6.1 with Family Sharing support and misc fixes.

**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/oxters168/Pluvia/compare/v1.3.1...v1.3.2

releases.name: v1.3.1
releases.body:
# Hotfix
Fix of crash for top padding must be non-negative

releases.name: v1.3.0
releases.body:
Additions: 
- [Preference] Day, Night, Auto theme.
- [Preference] Theme color palette.
- [Preference] Which screen to launch on. (Library, Downloads, or Friends).
- Chatting with friends, with message history, emoticon and sticker support. 
- Friend profiles, with basic friend management.
- Option to view external web links in app or externally with a browser of choice.
- Game app screen shows basic information.
- More library filer options, which are retained. 

Fixes: 
- Profile dialog works better for long names now.
- Crash when null messages are logged. 
- Crashes when a failed sign in occurred, such as invalid credentials. 
- Correct display of install/run button and download progress for apps. Thanks @Producdevity
- Add smooth transitions for download state. Thanks @Producdevity
- Friends list groups able to be collapsible now.
- Library scroll position should remember when navigating away.
- Library list optimization.
- Soft resize issue with on-screen keyboard is opened/closed.
- Rotating the screen closes some dialogs.
- Dialog list scrolling on small screen height. Thanks @Producdevity
- Themed app icon being oversized.
- Game app screen image loading shifting.

Changes: 
- Connection to steam now uses the Web Socket protocol.
- Login errors are shown in a snackbar.
- Various theme unification for light and dark mode.
- Various Compose tweaks.
- Access tokens now encrypted.
- Removed automatic app backup.
- Actively filter out Spacewar (game).
- Library filter options now is a bottom sheet modal.

Misc: 
- Add Github Actions for snapshot and validation builds.
- Update readme.
- Dependency updates. Now using JavaSteam 1.6.0.

**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/oxters168/Pluvia/compare/v1.2.0...v1.3.0

releases.name: v1.2.0
releases.body:
## What's Changed

- Readme updates.
- Add library search functionality.
- Add container settings
    - Add per app container settings.
    - Add default app container settings (Settings).
    - Add Box64 presets (Settings). 
- Change how the crash log report is organized.
- Allow the login screen to scroll when keyboard takes up too much of the screen when in landscape
- Fix the service from being stopped and started in login screen when device is rotated.
- Fix retry button in login screen when QR login times out.
- Fix infinite loading when signing out of Pluvia.
- Show which Fab filter is applied in Library list.
- JavaSteam snapshot updates.
- Various internal refactoring.


**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/oxters168/Pluvia/compare/v1.1.0...v1.2.0

releases.name: v1.1.0
releases.body:
## What's Changed
* Better logging support by @LossyDragon in https://github.com/oxters168/Pluvia/pull/22
* Update README.md by @LossyDragon in https://github.com/oxters168/Pluvia/pull/23
* Add exit button to service notification. by @LossyDragon in https://github.com/oxters168/Pluvia/pull/24
* Custom crash handler by @LossyDragon in https://github.com/oxters168/Pluvia/pull/25
* Fixed issue during 2FA login by @LossyDragon in https://github.com/Longi94/JavaSteam/pull/314
* Changed version name to use semantic versioning by @oxters168 in https://github.com/oxters168/Pluvia/pull/33


**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/oxters168/Pluvia/compare/v1.0...v1.1.0

releases.name: star Bionic REVAMPED - Fully converted UI to Jetpack compose, Timeline Semaphore patches in default Turnip and store integration optimizations.
releases.body: **After a long wait, we finally converted the old Java XML UI to the new Jetpack Compose UI. We also implemented Timeline Semaphore patches to a specific Turnip to have no regressions on newer DXVKs. Not only that, but the stores integration has been improved.** # Changelog - Fully converted Java XML UI to Jetpack Compose, giving the most unique look ever. This is the only Winlator fork to have this, big jump! - Modified controller implementation to work with the Jetpack Compose UI. This was broken before. - Modified the default Turnip to one with Timeline Semaphore patches built in, deleting regressions with newer DXVKs. - Stores implementation has been improved. Steam isnt fully working, we would need to implement Pluvia or something else to manage all the Steam stuff like GameNative does. - Rewrote controller implementation to work with the Jetpack compose UI - Updated the first installing screen **NOTE:** Even tho the container menu shows box64 0.3.7, it uses the one you chose. Its just a visual bug. # DXVK 2.5+ fix - Utilize the DXVK below with the default Turnip in the app (SDK36 One) to not have any regressions when using dxvk 2.5+. The latest dxvk (2.7.1) is uploaded here. # Keeping Star up to date with Obtainium Use [Obtainium](https://github.com/ImranR98/Obtainium) to automatically track and install new **star** releases directly from GitHub. # Contributors @The412Banner - Converting the UI to Jetpack compose and rewriting the controller implementation @jacojayy - Timeline Semaphore patches in Turnip

releases.name: star Bionic 1.1 | Built-in Game Stores Update (Steam, Epic Games and GOG)
releases.body: **After a long wait, the time is here. We have successfuly implemented the built-in game stores such as Epic Games, Steam, GOG, Amazon Games to maximize your experience.** # Changelog - Implemented built-in game stores such as Amazon Games, Steam, GOG and Epic Games to make the ultimate Winlator experience. Now you're be able to enjoy your own game library in the stores just by a single login in the selected game store - Added the different versions of wrapper, now you can switch the wrapper versions to any version that you would like to use - Fixed the add shortcut function doesn't work properly - Fixed frontend support - Completely rebuilt start menu in container - Revamped main menu UI adding titles to each section - General localization fixes - Small revamp of UI in general - Wrapper has been reworked. # Documentation of the work done https://github.com/The412Banner/BannerHub/tree/main/game-store-reports

releases.name: star Bionic V1.0 - Stable Release
releases.body: **After a long wait, the Bionic version of star is finally released. We have so many huge changes here in this version, we promise.** # Changelog - Implemented a new FPS Counter - You can now easily manager your FPS Counter in the container menu. You can adjust It however you like, adding CPU Temperaturs, GPU Load or just having a simple FPS Counter. - Graphics Engine implemented (thanks to @StevenMXZ) - You can now use a new Super Resolution setting, a DLS Color Boost setting and most importantly, the HDR, like the one used in GameHub directly in the container! - Reimplemented the Save Manager from winlator cmod @coffincolors - You can now easily manager your save datas without even entering the container, by simply going in the menu and going in the saves page. - Reimplemented the export and import container feature. - Self explainatory. - Revamped the layout of the shortcut menu, inspired from winlator bionic by @de0ver - With the addition of sort, switch-able layout into grid or list and ability to import shortcut from internal storage, the shortcut menu are now looks fresh and very interesting - Implemented the custom icon in the shortcut item settings and controller elements settings - You can now feel free to import any of the pictures from your device storage into the shortcut icon or controller elements icon - Implemented the Active Windows from Winlator Official @brunodev85 - You can use this feature to check the active windows or bring the windows into front by tapping on the windows inside the dialog - Improved the Wine Start Menu - Added a few more apps that are imported from winlator official @brunodev85 and imported the star prefix start menu from the previous release of star plus the addition of web browser in online installable components - Implemented a new controller implementation (Thanks to @Vivsi1) - You can now play games with a new controller support like the One in Cmod 13, but better - Merged some changes made by @Pipetto-crypto - Merged for updating the wrapper, zink, d8vk files, many other small changes in XServerDisplayActivity and add the Proton option in the contents menu - Changed the download able contents URL to @Xnick417x for more bionic nightlies (thanks to him) - Added latest turnip 26.1.0 (but we have no idea if it works in Adreno 8xx series) but so far it's works very well in Adreno 6xx and 7xx series # Version Information - Original: Regular package name, `com.winlator.star` - Ludashi: For locking processor frequencies at maximum especially on Xiaomi devices, `com.ludashi.benchmark` - Antutu: It's same functionality as ludashi but it's an alternative, in order if you have installed the bionic apk with existing ludashi package name, `com.antutu.ABenchMark`

releases.name: star 11-2 | Stable Release
releases.body: **Small update of star emulator v11 are now released! Check them out what we have changed in this release!** # Changelog - Added USB storage permission like winlator bionic - Fixed and restored the online components in the start menu - Improved the default environment variables - Added several new environment variables for experimental in the glibc, ported from winlator bionic - Small fixes

releases.name: Winlator 11 Final mod Ajay
releases.body:
## Changelog (Based on Official v11 Final)

---

### **Drive Path Update**
* **Path Migration:** Changed `drive E` to `drive K` for `installed_components`.
* **Manual Installation:** Supported manual copying of components directly to `drive K\installed_components\`.

### **System & Environment**
* **Automated Symlink:** Mapped `C:\users` to `Z:\home\Ajay_drive\users` to prevent save data loss when switching containers.
* **Environment Variables:** Added some env variables.
* **Box64rc Optimization:** Updated config for trainer compatibility and added "trainer" keyword logic for auto-application.

### **Quick Access (Start Menu)**
* **Components Downloader:** Added GUI app for one-click downloads of **Box64**, **Turnip**, **DXVK** etc. (Improved error handling in hotfix)
* **Latest box64rc Downloader:** Added option to download the latest **Ajay.box64rc** instantly.
---
#### Note : Don't Change drive K path.
---

## 📁 Necessary Components and Tools

### ✅ [D3D Local tzst Files Collection](https://github.com/ajay9634/PcEmuFiles-Hub/releases/tag/D3D_tzst)  
### ⚙️ [Ajay Prefix Pro](https://github.com/ajay9634/Ajay-prefix) 

---

releases.name: Winlator 11 beta v3.1 mod Ajay
releases.body:
### Changelog

* **Drive path Update:** Changed drive E path to drive K for installed_components , You can copy box64,  turnip etc to drive K.
* **Automated Setup:** Implemented automatic configuration for SymLink folders and required dependencies.
* **Environment Variables:** Added new environment variables for improved configuration.
* **Start Menu:** Added an automatic update check feature to the Start Menu.
* **Box64rc:** Updated `box64rc` specifically for trainer compatibility.

---

### Final Update
* **SymLink Fix:** Resolved an issue causing the SymLink process to repeat unnecessarily.
* **Autorun.exe:** The application now runs without a console window.
* **Bug Fixes:** General stability improvements and minor bug resolutions.

### How to run ajau3 Script for downloading latest dxvk and turnip etc ?
Just install Ajay Prefix Pro then double click on it.
Requirements : Drive K should be mounted of this path -  `/data/data/com.winlator/files`

### How to run the trainer with game performance presets?
Simply include the word **"trainer"** in the filename of your game trainer or Cheat Engine application.

### Winlator.Ajay.Components.Downloader.ajau3 -
this program can be run after installing Ajay Prefix Pro. It can download latest installable components (box64 , turnip , wined3d , dxvk , vkd3d etc).

---
*Note: This release focuses exclusively on streamlining and automating the setup process. Do not close the container if any of the following processes are active in Task Manager: autorun.exe, cmd.exe, wget.exe, xcopy.exe, or 7z.exe.*

It uses the latest Wine from Kron4ek, but without the XInput patch.This is the final PRoot-based build.It can be useful for running older PC games.The latest Box64 version is not included in this build.

### Note about Upcoming Winlator Updates  -
If a major improvement is released in the official Winlator or if I need to create a backup. Currently, there is no need to modify the latest official Winlator as it is already well-optimized — simply install Ajay Prefix Pro.

releases.name: hakuX 0.3.1
releases.body:
## hakuX v0.3.1

### Performance
- Fix significant FPS regression on "lower-end" devices (Adreno < 740)
- Proper BC3 support
- Multiple tweaks to texture cache, significant improvements on titles such as Forza Motorsport

### Bug Fixes
- Fix BC3/DXT5 texture corruption on 3D textures
- Fix XISO converter not producing valid output — replaced Rust xdvdfs with C extract-xiso

### Diagnostics
- Persistent log capture across sessions — logs survive app restart, previous session preserved

releases.name: hakuX 0.3.0
releases.body:
# hakuX v0.3.0

## Performance
- GPU overhead reduction: batched surface downloads, eliminated redundant image transitions, no-op transition guard
- Texture cache doubled and made configurable — fixes texture pop-in in open-world games
- Native BC1/BC2 compressed texture upload; GPU compute DXT5 decompression
- NV2A fast-path expansion for high-frequency methods
- VkSampler cache, NEON blit optimization, optimized descriptor management

## Stability
- Fix 30fps trap — games no longer get stuck at half speed after temporary drops
- Fix pipeline exhaustion crash, surface eviction corruption, XISO conversion issues
- Fix RCU crash on quick restart, NOP assert, shader binding crash
- Xbox kernel crash detection with diagnostic output

## Audio
- Audio subsystem aligned with X1 BOX

## Texture Modding
- Dump game textures as PNG for texture pack creation

## Settings & UI & Networking
- Per-game settings with visual override highlighting
- Configurable texture cache size, skip occlusion queries, skip boot animation
- Xbox dashboard management, EEPROM editor, Insignia networking (ported from X1 BOX)
- Debug log export

## Known issues:
- Some games are broken on both hakuX and X1 BOX, like Night Caster. This is under investigation and probably related to something fundamental in the initial porting to Android
- Fable has fundamental issues made worse by some of the optimizations on hakuX. While probing the root cause added a disgusting skip.

releases.name: hakuX 0.2.1
releases.body:
## hakuX v0.2.1

### Bug Fixes
- **Mitigates HDD corruption** — restore block device flush on app terminate and background to persist QCOW2 metadata
- **Fix game freeze on TB flush** — disable post-flush rewarm on Android which could hang on self-modified code
- **Fix on-screen controller hidden on some devices** — filter out virtual/internal devices (accelerometers, gyroscopes)

### Improvements
- **Simplified FPS overlay** — shows only FPS count

releases.name: hakuX 0.2.0
releases.body:
## hakuX v0.2.0

### New Features
- **OpenGL ES renderer** — experimental alternative to Vulkan, selectable in Graphics settings (ported from X1 BOX)
- **EEPROM editor** — change Xbox language, video standard, resolution modes, aspect ratio, refresh rate (ported from X1 BOX)
- **Settings index** — reorganized into 4 sections: hakuX Data, Graphics, Debug, EEPROM
- **System file pickers** — change MCPX ROM, Flash ROM, HDD image from settings
- **HDD export** — save a copy of the Xbox HDD to any folder
- **Games folder in settings** — moved from library screen to settings
- **Game search** — search bar with live filtering in game library
- **Pull-to-refresh** — swipe down to rescan games folder
- **XISO progress bar** — real progress tracking across copy/convert/save phases

### Improvements
- **Controller overlay** — D-pad/stick repositioned, LS/RS as separate buttons, menu button, swipe-up gesture, trigger axis fix (-1.0 for release), per-pointer tracking  (ported from X1 BOX)
- **Pause menu** — actually pauses emulation, simplified UI
- **NEON optimizations** — S3TC decompression and texture swizzle (benefits both renderers)

### Bug Fixes
- Fix TB cache crash when FP settings change between sessions
- Fix pause/resume not working from in-game menu
- Fix GLES geometry shader crash (gl_PointSize unavailable without extension)
- Fix GLES shader version detection (was hardcoded to 320, now auto-detected)
- Fix shader link failure crash (graceful fallback instead of assert)
- Fix shared GLSL changes breaking VK (gated behind renderer check)

releases.name: dev8
releases.body:
### Changelog

* `winlator_bionic` -> `upstream` : `winlator_bionic_devbranch`
* changed wfm to a version without icons for faster loading, thanks to de0ver for this.
* re-added dxvk scale and opacity
* updated adrenotools
* added virtual gamepad lightup.
* Merge branch 'winlator_bionic' into 'winlator_bionic_dev5'
* `DXVKConfigDialog`: refractor setEnvVars
* `WineD3DConfigDialog`: fix typo
* Add a `WineD3DConfigDialog` to configure wined3d
* `ContainerDetailFragment`: remove all wined3d related registry keys
* move ddrawrapper config into `DXVKConfigDialog`
* vulkan: slight refactoring
* move vkd3d configuration into `DXVKConfigDialog`
* `SettingsFragment`: add an option to change downloadable contents URL
* `ContentsManager`: restore downloadable contents
* update fexcore and wowbox64 versions

releases.name: dev7
releases.body:
IMPORTANT NOTICE
preinstalled FEXCore 2505 might fail to load on some devices use the 2508.1 wcp instead till I hotfix it tommrow.


### Release Notes

* Merged branch 'winlator_bionic' from pipetto-crypto into 'winlator_bionic_dev5'.
* Refactored 'ContainerDetailFragment' to partially fix setupDXWrapper logic.
* Updated v762 and v805 to v819.
* Added required variables to 'GuestProgramLauncherComponent' to disable the proton mediaconverter plugin.
* 'ContainerDetailFragment': Recreated config if wrapper version is empty.
* Defaulted to 'turnip25.1.0' on supported devices.
* 'Vulkan': Minor refactoring.
* 'GraphicsDriverConfigDialog': Blacklisted unsupported drivers.
* 'DXVKConfigDialog': Blacklisted 'arm64ec dxvk' on non 'arm64ec' containers.
* Removed non-necessary assets.
* 'GLRenderer': Added 'force fullscreen' option.
* Fixed background selection in container settings.
* 'StorageInfoDialog': Refactored.
* Removed unused 'RestoreActivity' class.
* Removed all code related to the 'SaveManager'.
* Removed the option to export containers.
* Removed the option to import containers.
* 'SettingsFragment': Removed backup and restore data options.
* Assets: Fixed wrong 'aarch64 dlls'.
* Removed all references to 'Winlator 7.1.2' legacy input mode.
* 'VKD3DVersionItem': Does not force version on assets files.
* Removed 'TerminalActivity' and all related code.
* 'Vulkan': Minor refactoring.
* Deleted saves, the magnifier, and screen effects.
* Changed shortcut text color to white.
* Defaulted background key press to shortcut list like the start page.
* Brought back container icons.

releases.name: Steamlator 1.7
releases.body: Split controls into two tabs: - Sensor - Gamepad In the Gamepad tab, visual gamepad button display was added. Added the **Controller Manager** button (similar to the Winlator Cmod implementation) Added support for custom icons (2 formats available: full white mode / original color mode) Added 2 new control types: - radial-menu (like in Winlator 11) - swipe-pad (allows button input using swipe gestures ← → ↑ ↓) Added visual feedback when pressing almost all button types. Added the **Quick HUD** function to container settings. It allows quick access to: - controls - keyboard Added a new **Device** tab where you can view: - CPU name - RAM usage Added **Open WineCFG** and **Open Regedit** buttons to container settings (these become available after container creation) This allows opening these programs directly inside the container in vertical mode. Now after container creation, it is possible to change the Wine / Proton version. Fixed loading of Box64 versions from Content. Added versions 0.42 and others to the **WoWBox64** tab. Added Wine versions: - 9.7 - 8.2 Added the ability to download Turnip drivers online in the **Adreno-tools** tab (from the K11MCH1 repository) Now Wine / Proton downloaded from Content will be located in: `Z:\opt` Updated the **Toggle Fullscreen** button Before: - simply stretched the canvas to 100% Now: - allows manual stretch adjustment while keeping screen borders Added a gear icon on the right side of **WineD3D**, where settings from Wine Configuration were moved. Added language switching in **Settings** New language added: - Spanish Fixed the visual freeze at 76% during ImageFS installation. Added log output during: - ImageFS installation - container startup Added clipboard copy support in the **Logs (Wine Debug)** tab. Added a new **Limit FPS** tab. Added the **export** folder inside assets which allows loading data into: `Z:\export` # Box64 / Turnip Updates Box64 0.42 Turnip 26.0 R8 / 26.0 R8 GMEM

releases.name: Steamlator 1.6
releases.body:
## Graphical Drivers – Added / Updated

- **Vortek 2.1** ([From Winlator 11](https://github.com/brunodev85/winlator/releases/tag/v11.0.0))
- **Qualcomm Driver v842.6** for 8 Elite, 8 Gen4, 8eGen5 processors (from GameHub)  
- **Turnip** updated to v25.3.0 R10  
- **Turnip v25.3.0 Gmem** for xx6, xx7 series processors (Adreno 710, 720 …)  

## Other Changes

- Fixed **Proton 9.0 arm64ec** operation  
- Added **dxvk 2.7.1** to contents  
- **dxvk-2.4 gplasync** added by default  
- Buttons now **react visually when pressed** ([from Winlator coffincolors](https://github.com/coffincolors/winlator))

### ✅ Is it safe to use Steamlator?  
[Click here to check security details](https://github.com/slaker222/Steamlator/blob/winlator_bionic/security.md)

# ❓ Why use Steamlator

| # | Feature | Supported |
|---|---------|-----------|
| 1️⃣ | Access to online games | ✅ Yes |
| 2️⃣ | Download mods directly from Steam Workshop | ✅ Yes |
| 3️⃣ | Full-featured Steam client | ✅ Yes |
| 4️⃣ | Installing games from Epic Games | ✅ Yes |
| 5️⃣ | Games download to the Download folder and can be launched on any emulator | ✅ Yes |
| 6️⃣ | Save synchronization with PC | ✅ Yes |
| 7️⃣ | Conflicts with Winlator | ❌ No |

releases.name: Steamlator 1.5.2
releases.body:
🏗 Based on Winlator Just Bionic 1.5.2


🚀 Key Changes

Steam is built into the APK – when you launch the container, the Steam launcher opens automatically.
    
![photo_5792158196801063468_y](https://github.com/user-attachments/assets/37e5ab07-da9e-4051-b1ba-339b44e0e50e)

Uses special launch arguments for maximum compatibility.

Verified: Steam runs on devices with Helio G99 and Snapdragon 665
(devices with more powerful processors will work as well).
    
Steamlator includes all the features of Winlator Just Bionic 1.5.2, including:

 Support for importing .wcp files

All functionality of the original Winlator Just Bionic

🖥 Windows Application Support

Steamlator uses Proton + Box64 to run Windows applications.

You can also install Wine via:
 Contents → select version 9.2 or 9.16.

🎮 DXVK Updates

Added DXVK 2.6.1 and Glansync

Added DXVK 2.7

Older DXVK versions are still available

New FPS limit options added: 25 FPS and 35 FPS

🌍 Localization

The Steamlator interface now includes:

English language 

Russian language 

Ukrainian language 
        
❓ Why use Steamlator
-- | --
🔗 Access to online games | ✅ Yes
📦 Download mods directly from Steam Workshop | ✅ Yes
🧩 Full-featured Steam client | ✅ Yes
📁 Games download to the Download folder and can be launched on any emulator | ✅ Yes
🔄 Save synchronization with PC | ✅ Yes
🚫 Conflicts with Winlator | ❌ No

releases.name: Winlator bionic ref4ik mod v9
releases.body:
## Winlator Mod bionic — ref4ik v9

**What's New in This Version:**

- Added support for animated covers for games

- Added Relative Mouse option from the container to the control settings

- Added the ability to set a custom icon for a game

- Added BCn settings from implementation Winlator Bionic @Pipetto-crypto

- Improved File Explorer — now you can create a game shortcut directly from it

- Interface changes: moved menus, "Installed Components" section, and Gamepad Test

- Removed Big Picture menu from the project and cleaned up other unused code

- Created a new SystemSensorPaths class - that contains all paths to the device's system sensors and centralized all sensor queries 

- Replaced the GL renderer with a Vulkan renderer. Old GL effects were removed, all effects were ported to custom Vulkan fragment shaders; added a Vulkan post-processing pipeline.
The Vulkan renderer implementation is based on Winlator Ludashi @StevenMXZ

- Added new sensor paths: hwmon/MTK

- Added content provider selection in Contents (ref4ik, the412banner, and the ability to add your own custom provider)

- Added "Box/FEX Extreme" preset

- When enabling Toggle Fullscreen , the sharpness effect is now automatically enabled to improve image qualit

- Fixed translations

- Added a slider in container settings to change text DPI


<details>
<summary>← Click here to view full previous changelog</summary>

### Previous Major Updates

🟣 Fixed FPS counter  
🟣 Fixed error in driver loading menu  
🟣 Removed limitation — now all Turnip drivers are shown in every repository (not just the first 10)  
🟣 **AdrenoTools**: added option to export downloaded driver to device storage  
🟣 Added option to hide FEX/Box config files when one is selected  
🟣 Game shortcut icons now load from **Steam**  
🟣 **Adreno Settings**: added initial parameters (work in progress)  
🟣 Integrated **AdrenoTools Store** for extended driver functionality  
🟣 Introduced **Wrapper v2** — improved driver selection UI  
🟣 Added fast **WFM** implementation from de0ver  
🟣 Added full **Russian** language support  
🟣 Reworked input controls settings:  
  → Now you can add custom icons to controls  
  → Go to control profile editor → select icons → apply  
  → Long-press icon to remove  
🟣 Added modular **FPS counter** in xservermenu (select parameters & save config)  
🟣 Updated Task Manager: added GPU and battery temperature indicators  
🟣 Changed application color scheme  
🟣 FPS counter: fixed bugs + added dimming option  
🟣 Input controls: added slider for custom icon size  
🟣 Fixed crash when adding Wine Proton  
🟣 **Active Windows**: now you can open/close running programs (UI/functionality to be improved later)  
🟣 Added built-in **File Manager**  
🟣 New screen effects  
🟣 Some FEX-related changes  
🟣 Ported components from 0.3.7.1 (Fex2508–2509)  
🟣 Partially updated app theme  
🟣 Fixed multiple bugs  
🟣 Changes in graphics driver handling  
🟣 Added **ALSA reflector**  
🟣 Fixed frame rate issues  
🟣 Updated image installer  
🟣 Added gamepad detection  
🟣 Added URL content support  
🟣 Big **"Putre"** button for quick game settings  
🟣 Moved preset frame parameters into container  
🟣 Added more options in graphics driver settings  
🟣 Added hotkey-based manual export  
🟣 Fixed wallpaper adding  
🟣 Fixed fullscreen mode  
🟣 Fixed hotkey settings  
🟣 Increased custom icon limit: 27 → 1000  
🟣 Fixed conflict with simultaneous Termux installation  
🟣 Control settings: added option to disable button outline + transparency slider  
🟣 Various design improvements  
🟣 Significantly improved Active Windows behavior  
🟣 Greatly improved manual shortcut import  
🟣 Added **FEX** preset  
🟣 Added ability to install Windows components  
🟣 Added DXVK & Turnip download into container  
🟣 Added audio driver settings  
🟣 Improved FPS counter: new design, draggable, more size options  
🟣 Added FPS limiter  
🟣 Added app language selector in settings  
🟣 Added Box/FEX/etc. buttons for hotkey preset creation  
🟣 Added import/export for Box (.boxx) and FEX (.fexx) presets
- Added my custom modified **WFM**  
- Added ability to download **Wine** directly into the container  
- Updated **Content Manager**  
- Updated **Credits & Acknowledgements** section  
- Fixed multiple issues in translations  
- Added **Voltage** parameter to the FPS counter  
- Fixed various bugs in the FPS counter  
- Interface improvements and polishing   
- Added Chinese language  
- Added a new HDR effect to screen effects  
- Improved active windows  
- Fixed control settings  
- Fixed some bugs in themes  
- Fixed some minor bugs 
- - Added the ability to add your own custom repository with drivers in Adrenotools

- Added gyroscope control

- Added update check

- Fixed some bugs

- Added download buttons for Box and FEX in the container and in the shortcut settings

- Added import and export of container settings configuration

- Updated DXVK settings

- Added a file manager for the container

- Added animation selection

- Added GPU load parameter and frame time graph to the FPS counter

- Added pause functionality when minimizing the app (the container is no longer destroyed, but paused instead)

**Removed Features:**  
- Magnifier  
- Touch helper function  

**Minor Optimizations:** Various small performance and smoothness improvements.

- Viewing and removing shared installed components

- Fixed touch control disappearing after 5 seconds #9 

- Fixed downloading and caching of game covers

- Fixed UI bugs

- Improved on-screen controls editor

- Added frame generation from If the frame generator does not work on the first container launch, try restarting the container.

- Updated FPS counter

- Added experimental Steam games launch

- Fixed a bug when downloading Wine where other versions stopped working #4 

- Rebuilt some Wine ref4ik versions with additional patches

- Fixed API output in the FPS counter and added GPU temperature indicator.

- Fixed black screen on first container boot.

- Improved shortcuts.

- Improved frame generation.

- Improved game import menu

- Added FSR effect.

- Added profiling for the selected game.

- Added control profile preview.

- Fixed a bug when importing Wine with x86_64 architecture where nothing would 
launch inside Wine.

- Improved XServer.

- Added Quick Panel.

- Improved Task Manager.

</details>

**Version information:**

- **Lite version** — regular/standard signature: `com.winlator.ref4ik`  
- **Lud version** — APK signature of the benchmark for locking processor frequencies at maximum: `com.ludashi.benchmark`  


**Join  community and get the latest news, builds, and discussions:**  
👉 **Telegram Channel:** https://t.me/winlatorruu  

**If you encounter any problems, please report them here: [GitHub lssues](https://github.com/REF4IK/winlator-ref4ik-/issues)**

Please star the project if you like it! ⭐
Your support helps a lot and motivates me to continue development.

releases.name: Winlator bionic ref4ik mod v9
releases.body:
## Winlator Mod bionic — ref4ik v9

**What's New in This Version:**

- Added support for animated covers for games

- Added Relative Mouse option from the container to the control settings

- Added the ability to set a custom icon for a game

- Added BCn settings from implementation Winlator Bionic @Pipetto-crypto

- Improved File Explorer — now you can create a game shortcut directly from it

- Interface changes: moved menus, "Installed Components" section, and Gamepad Test

- Removed Big Picture menu from the project and cleaned up other unused code

- Created a new SystemSensorPaths class - that contains all paths to the device's system sensors and centralized all sensor queries 

- Replaced the GL renderer with a Vulkan renderer. Old GL effects were removed, all effects were ported to custom Vulkan fragment shaders; added a Vulkan post-processing pipeline.
The Vulkan renderer implementation is based on Winlator Ludashi @StevenMXZ

- Added new sensor paths: hwmon/MTK

- Added content provider selection in Contents (ref4ik, the412banner, and the ability to add your own custom provider)

- Added "Box/FEX Extreme" preset

## Winlator Mod bionic — ref4ik v5

**What's New in This Version:**

<details>

### Previous Major Updates

🟣 Fixed FPS counter

🟣 Added full **Russian** language support  
🟣 Reworked input controls settings:  
  → Now you can add custom icons to controls  
  → Go to control profile editor → select icons → apply  
  → Long-press icon to remove  
🟣 Added modular **FPS counter** in xservermenu (select parameters & save config)  
🟣 Updated Task Manager: added GPU and battery temperature indicators  
🟣 Changed application color scheme  
🟣 FPS counter: fixed bugs + added dimming option  
🟣 Input controls: added slider for custom icon size  
🟣 Fixed crash when adding Wine Proton  
🟣 **Active Windows**: now you can open/close running programs (UI/functionality to be improved later)  
🟣 Added built-in **File Manager**  
🟣 New screen effects  
🟣 Some FEX-related changes  
🟣 Ported components from 0.3.7.1 (Fex2508–2509)  
🟣 Partially updated app theme  
🟣 Fixed multiple bugs  
🟣 Changes in graphics driver handling  
🟣 Added **ALSA reflector**  
🟣 Fixed frame rate issues  
🟣 Updated image installer  
🟣 Added gamepad detection  
🟣 Added URL content support  
🟣 Big **"Putre"** button for quick game settings  
🟣 Moved preset frame parameters into container  
🟣 Added more options in graphics driver settings  
🟣 Added hotkey-based manual export  
🟣 Fixed wallpaper adding  
🟣 Fixed fullscreen mode  
🟣 Fixed hotkey settings  
🟣 Increased custom icon limit: 27 → 1000  
🟣 Fixed conflict with simultaneous Termux installation  
🟣 Control settings: added option to disable button outline + transparency slider  
🟣 Various design improvements  
🟣 Significantly improved Active Windows behavior  
🟣 Greatly improved manual shortcut import  
🟣 Added **FEX** preset  
🟣 Added ability to install Windows components  
🟣 Added DXVK & Turnip download into container  
🟣 Added audio driver settings  
🟣 Improved FPS counter: new design, draggable, more size options  
🟣 Added FPS limiter  
🟣 Added app language selector in settings  
🟣 Added Box/FEX/etc. buttons for hotkey preset creation  
🟣 Added import/export for Box (.boxx) and FEX (.fexx) presets
- Added my custom modified **WFM**  
- Added ability to download **Wine** directly into the container  
- Updated **Content Manager**  
- Updated **Credits & Acknowledgements** section  
- Fixed multiple issues in translations  
- Added **Voltage** parameter to the FPS counter  
- Fixed various bugs in the FPS counter  
- Interface improvements and polishing    

**Removed Features:**  
- Magnifier  
- Touch helper function  

**Minor Optimizations:** Various small performance and smoothness improvements.

</details>

**Version information:**

- **Lite version** — regular/standard signature: `com.winlator.ref4ik`  
- **Lud version** — APK signature of the benchmark for locking processor frequencies at maximum: `com.ludashi.benchmark`

launch inside Wine.

- Improved Task Manager.

🟣 Moved preset frame parameters into container  
🟣 Added more options in graphics driver settings  
🟣 Added hotkey-based manual export  
🟣 Fixed wallpaper adding  
🟣 Fixed fullscreen mode  
🟣 Fixed hotkey settings  
🟣 Increased custom icon limit: 27 → 1000  
🟣 Fixed conflict with simultaneous Termux installation

🟣 Various design improvements

🟣 Added DXVK & Turnip download into container

- Added ability to download **Wine** directly into the container  
- Updated **Content Manager**  
- Updated **Credits & Acknowledgements** section  
- Fixed multiple issues in translations

- Fixed various bugs in the FPS counter  
- Interface improvements and polishing   
- Added Chinese language  
- Added a new HDR effect to screen effects  
- Improved active windows  
- Fixed control settings  
- Fixed some bugs in themes  
- Fixed some minor bugs 
- - Added the ability to add your own custom repository with drivers in Adrenotools

- Added gyroscope control

- Added update check

- Fixed some bugs

- Added download buttons for Box and FEX in the container and in the shortcut settings

- Added import and export of container settings configuration

- Updated DXVK settings

- Added a file manager for the container

- Added animation selection

- Added GPU load parameter and frame time graph to the FPS counter

- Added pause functionality when minimizing the app (the container is no longer destroyed, but paused instead)

releases.name: Winlator~Honkon v11
releases.body:
### VERSION WINLATOR V11 MOD

***Esta versión sigue siendo básica pero trae algunas mejoras en general y otras más específicas para dispositivo mediatek,gpu mali y gpu xclipse.***

### _registro_ _de_ _cambios_

•Todo los cambios de la versión oficial de Bruno.
•Se agregó el menu de contenido de la versión afeimod(creditos y agradecimiento).
•Traduje gran parte de la interfaz a español además de cambiar el logo y tema.
•Se cambió el directorio de donde se descarga el contenido,esto para agregar DXVK parcheado como stripped o sarek para mayor compatibilidad con vulkan 1.1 o 1.2 con pocas extenciones disponibles, también se agregaron varios wined3d para descargar.
•Se agregaron varías variables en la configuración de box64 para mayor rendimiento y compatibilidad.
•Se agregaron parches para el rendimiento y compatibilidad.
•se agregaron complemento necesario para distintos títulos funcionen correctamente.
•se agregaron distintas variables para rendimiento, compatibilidad y estabilidad.

releases.name: Winlator~honkon v10.1
releases.body: ### vortek+DXVK ya funciona en gpu mali Esta versión sigue siendo básica pero trae algunas mejoras en general y otras más específicas para dispositivo mediatek,gpu mali y xclipse,más adelante subiré una versión completa :) AVISO:vortek no funciona en todo los dispositivos con mediatek,esto debido a varios factores lo cuales son driver, versión de vulkan ,extenciones etc... Bruno trabajo arduamente para mejorar la compatibilidad y rendimiento de winlator en dispositivos con gpu mali y xclipse. ### Registro de cambios: 1- se uso la versión de afie mod como inspiración,créditos y agradecimiento.. Aquí la versión por si la quieren probar [mod afei](https://github.com/afeimod/winlator-mod/releases/tag/10.0-Amod5fix) 1.1• se elimino la opción de comandos y traduje la opción para agregar contenido... Tenga en cuenta que algunas cajas y controladores deben instalarse con wine9.16.whp antes de poder usarse,está opción solo es para pruebas, por favor apoya al autor original. 2•Se cambió el directorio de donde se descarga el contenido,esto para agregar DXVK parcheado como stripped o sarek para mayor compatibilidad con vulkan 1.1 o 1.2 con pocas extenciones disponibles, también se agregaron varios wined3d para descargar. 3•Se agregaron parches para el rendimiento y compatibilidad. 4•se agregaron complemento necesario para distintos títulos funcionen correctamente. 5•se agregaron distintas variables para rendimiento, compatibilidad y estabilidad.

releases.name: Winlator~honkon v10
releases.body:
•"vortek+DXVK ya funciona en gpu mali"

•"Esta es una versión básica,solo agregué el contenido de winlator v9~honkon más algunas novedades,más adelante subiré una versión completa" :)

•Se cambió el directorio de donde se descarga el contenido,esto para agregar DXVK parcheado como stripped o sarek para mayor compatibilidad con vulkan 1.1 o 1.2 con pocas extenciones disponibles, también se agregaron varios wined3d para descargar.
•Se agregaron parches para el rendimiento y compatibilidad.
•se agregaron complemento necesario para distintos títulos funcionen correctamente.
•se agregaron distintas variables para rendimiento, compatibilidad y estabilidad=
BOX64_FPU_MODE=1 
MESA_NO_DITHER=1
BOX64_SKIP_SIGSEGV=1
BOX64_DYNAREC_DIRTY=1

releases.name: Winlator~honkon 9
releases.body:
•"Esta es una versión básica, solo agregué el contenido de winlator v8~honkon,más adelante subiré una versión completa"  :)

•Se agregaron wined3d en las configuraciones del container,se recomienda entrar con el wined3d por default al crear el container para evitar errores.
•Se cambió el directorio de donde se descarga el contenido.
•Se dejó la opción de DXVK,esto para los usuarios Mali que soporten vortek.
•Se agregaron parches para el rendimiento y compatibilidad.
•se subió una sola versión que será "benchmark",esto para mayor rendimiento pero no interfiere con otras versión de winlator.

releases.name: Winlator v8.0 R1~Honkon
releases.body:
Registro de cambios

•Se aplicaron los cambios de la versión anterior "winlator~honkon v8"
•Se eliminaron algunos Wined3d y complementos para reducir el peso del apk.
• algunas correcciones,mejoras en el rendimiento y compatibilidad.
•se subió una sola versión que será "bench",esto para mayor rendimiento pero no interfiere con otras versión de winlator.

releases.name: Winlator~honkon v7pre-final (gran aumento de rendimiento)
releases.body:
Para los amantes de winlator Mali,se volvió a modificar la versión v7 de winlator para dar el mayor rendimiento y compatibilidad posible en dispositivos con gpu Mali,créditos y agradecimiento a BrunoSX.

Registro de cambios

•Se actualizo el wine 9.2custom,créditos y agradecimiento a coffincolors.
•Se agrego distintos parches,créditos y agradecimiento a Frost.

• se agregaron Wined3d en las configuraciones del container en el apartado DX wrapper...
Para evitar errores se recomienda crear el container y abrirlo por primera vez,después ya puede cambiar el Wined3d sin ningún problema.

•se actualizo libvirglrender.so para mayor rendimiento, créditos y agradecimiento a EatingSumo/longjunyu2.
•Se actualizo mesa VirGL para mayor rendimiento.
•Se aplicaron los cambios de la versión anteriores honkon.
•Se eliminaron algunos Wined3d y complementos para reducir el peso del apk.
• algunas correcciones,mejoras en el rendimiento y compatibilidad.
•se subió una sola versión que será "bench",esto para mayor rendimiento pero no interfiere con otras versión de winlator.

releases.name: Winlator~honkon v8.0
releases.body:
### Registro de cambios ### 

•Se agregaron los cambios incluidos en la versión de frot,crédito y agradecimiento.

•se remplazo libvirglrender.so y mesa VirGL por el de winlator glibc para mayor rendimiento.
•Cómo la opción de GLversión en el apartado de mesa VirGL render da error al tener COMPAT se agregó la opción en las variables de entorno.

•ahora podrá cambiar ***MESA_GL_VERSION_OVERRIDE y MESA_EXTENSION_MAX_YEAR*** de forma facil en las variables de entorno,esto se encuentra en las configuraciones del container.
•***extenciones extras de OpenGL para VirGL***

• encontrará configuración para distintos juegos en el apartado de Star dentro del container, agradecimiento a Fcharan.
• se agregó Wined3d en las configuraciones del container, puede no funcionar.
• se agregó box86,box64,Wined3d,mesa VirGL,wine gecko,mono offline y algunos complementos.
• algunas correcciones,mejoras en el rendimiento y compatibilidad.
•se subió una sola versión que será "bench",esto  para mayor rendimiento pero no interfiere con otras versión de winlator

releases.body:
### 🆕 Winlator_Brasil_10.1, Winlator_Brasil_10.1_AI e Winlator Brasil CLT – Novas Versões

Esta atualização traz duas versões, **Winlator Brasil 10.1**, **Winlator_Brasil_10.1_AI** e **Winlator Brasil CLT**. 

**Permitindo instalar as 3 versões ao mesmo tempo, no seu celular**.

![Screenshot_2025-05-28-13-46-30-893_com miui home](https://github.com/user-attachments/assets/11ae82c8-c174-425a-909d-0aa1b31db7f5)


---

O **Winlator Brasil 10.1** traz diversas melhorias e recursos adicionais para aprimorar sua experiência com jogos no Android. 

O **Winlator_Brasil_10.1_AI** traz diversas melhorias e um desempenho melhor de gameplay e áudio.

O **Winlator Brasil CLT** é focado apenas em programas de trabalho do dia a dia.

--- 

Confira abaixo todas as novidades e instruções detalhadas.

---

- **NOTA:** Para utilizar o **Winlator Brasil 10.1**, você precisa desinstalar a versão original do Winlator ou Winlator Bionic ou qualquer Winlator associado ao nome do Winlator, se você já o possuía para poder instalar este mod. Ou, caso contrário, você não pode instalar este mod porque este mod é usado glibc e glibc não são suportados o nome personalizado para clonar o apk como benchmark ou qualquer outro nome.

---

### ✅ Novidades da Versão **Winlator Brasil 10.1**

- **📦 Pacote AIO Visual C++**. Instalação automática de todas as versões do Visual C++ Redistributable.
- **🌐 Novo Navegador Web**: Inclusão de um navegador leve para facilitar downloads e navegação.
- **🗜️ WinRAR**. Ferramenta de compactação/descompactação adicionada.
- **🎮 Perfis de Controles de Jogos**: Agora com 92 perfis disponíveis para download automático.

Veja como baixar os perfis de controle automaticamente:

![Download de Perfis](https://github.com/winlatorbrasil/Winlator-Brasil/blob/main/android_alsa/controle.gif )

- **📦 Instalação Offline do Wine Gecko e Mono**: Facilita a execução de aplicativos .NET e páginas com conteúdo HTML.
- **⚙️ Novas Flags do Box64**: 14 flags adicionadas para otimização e compatibilidade.
- **🌐 Novas Variáveis de Ambiente**: 17 variáveis configuráveis para ajuste fino de desempenho.
- **🇧🇷 Tradução 90% em Português (Brasil)**: Interface mais amigável para usuários brasileiros.
- **🍷 Suporte ao Wine 9.15 e 9.16 (ESTÃO EM BETA AINDA)**: Adição de menu para instalação dessas versões (Wine 10 não suportado).

`PODE ALTERNAR ENTRE AS VERSÕES DA WINE EM UM MESMO CONTAINER, SEM PRECISAR CRIAR UM NOVO CONTAINER, ISSO ESTÁ EM BETA TAMBÉM, ERROS PODEM ACONTECER.`

Aprenda a instalar as versões 9.15 e 9.16 do Wine:

![Instalação do Wine](https://github.com/winlatorbrasil/Winlator-Brasil/blob/main/android_alsa/winebug.gif )

- **🧠 Aumento da Memória Virtual**: Agora é possível configurar até 16384MB.
- **🎨 Novos Ícones nos Controles**: Facilita a edição e personalização dos controles.
- **⚡ Aumento do Limite de Taxa de Quadros**: Suporte para até 240 FPS.

---

### ✅ Novidades da Versão **Winlator_Brasil_10.1_AI**

- **⚠️ ATENÇÃO AOS DRIVERS**. Ele reconhece até:
 
**Turnip:** 24.3.0
**DXVK:** 2.5.3.0
**BOX:** 0.3.3

- **⚠️ Feito com base no Fork do foxrain versão usada foi a Winlator-9.0-Amod3_LuAi.apk**.
- **📦 Pacote AIO Visual C++**. Instalação automática de todas as versões do Visual C++ Redistributable.
- **🌐 Novo Navegador Web**: Inclusão de um navegador leve para facilitar downloads e navegação.
- **🎮 Perfis de Controles de Jogos**: Agora com 92 perfis disponíveis para download automático.

Veja como baixar os perfis de controle automaticamente:

![Download de Perfis](https://github.com/winlatorbrasil/Winlator-Brasil/blob/main/android_alsa/controle.gif )

- **🗜️ WinRAR**. Ferramenta de compactação/descompactação adicionada.
- **🇧🇷 Tradução 90% em Português (Brasil)**: Interface mais amigável para usuários brasileiros.
- **📦 Instalação Offline do Wine Gecko e Mono**: Facilita a execução de aplicativos .NET e páginas com conteúdo HTML.
- **⚡ Aumento do Limite de Taxa de Quadros**: Suporte para até 240 FPS.
- **🧠 Aumento da Memória Virtual**: Agora é possível configurar até 16384MB.

---

### ✅ Novidades da Versão **Winlator Brasil CLT**

- **⚠️ Feito com base no Fork do WB64DEV versão usada foi a Winlator-9.1.1.apk**.
- **📦 Pacote AIO Visual C++**. Instalação automática de todas as versões do Visual C++ Redistributable.
- **🌐 Novo Navegador Web**: Inclusão de um navegador leve para facilitar downloads e navegação.
- **🗜️ WinRAR**. Ferramenta de compactação/descompactação adicionada.
- **🇧🇷 Tradução 90% em Português (Brasil)**: Interface mais amigável para usuários brasileiros.
- **📦 Instalação Offline do Wine Gecko e Mono**: Facilita a execução de aplicativos .NET e páginas com conteúdo HTML.
- **💻 Instalação LibreOffice**. Instalação do pacote Office Open Source, para edição de arquivos Excel, Word e PowerPoint.
- **🖌️ Instalação Blender**: Instalação do Blender para modelagens 3D.
- **⚡ Aumento do Limite de Taxa de Quadros**: Suporte para até 240 FPS.
- **🧠 Aumento da Memória Virtual**: Agora é possível configurar até 16384MB.

### ⚙️ Explicações Técnicas 

#### 🔧 Flags do Box64 

As flags do Box64 permitem ajustar o comportamento do emulador para melhor compatibilidade e desempenho:

- `BOX64_DYNAREC_SAFEFLAGS`: Ativa flags seguras no recompilador dinâmico para evitar instruções potencialmente problemáticas.
- `BOX64_DYNAREC_FASTNAN`: Otimiza operações com valores NaN (Not a Number) para maior velocidade.
- `BOX64_DYNAREC_FASTROUND`: Utiliza arredondamento rápido em operações de ponto flutuante.
- `BOX64_DYNAREC_X87DOUBLE`: Garante precisão dupla nas operações com o coprocessador x87.
- `BOX64_DYNAREC_BIGBLOCK`: Permite blocos maiores de código no recompilador dinâmico, melhorando o desempenho.
- `BOX64_DYNAREC_STRONGMEM`: Implementa verificações de memória mais rigorosas para evitar acessos inválidos.
- `BOX64_DYNAREC_FORWARD`: Habilita a execução antecipada de instruções para otimização.
- `BOX64_DYNAREC_CALLRET`: Otimiza chamadas e retornos de funções.
- `BOX64_DYNAREC_WAIT`: Garante sincronização adequada em instruções de espera.
- `BOX64_AVX`: Ativa suporte às instruções AVX para aplicações que as utilizam.
- `BOX64_DYNAREC_NATIVEFLAGS`: Utiliza flags nativas do sistema host para melhor desempenho.
- `BOX64_DYNAREC_WEAKBARRIER`: Reduz barreiras de memória para melhorar a velocidade, com possível impacto na precisão.
- `BOX64_MAXCPU`: Define o número máximo de CPUs virtuais disponíveis para o emulador.
- `BOX64_UNITYPLAYER`: Otimiza a execução de jogos desenvolvidos com o Unity Player.

#### 🌐 Variáveis de Ambiente 

As variáveis de ambiente permitem configurar aspectos específicos do sistema e do emulador:

- `LC_ALL`: Define a localidade padrão do sistema, afetando formatação de datas, números, etc.
- `ZINK_DESCRIPTORS`: Controla o número de descritores usados pelo driver Zink.
- `ZINK_DEBUG`: Ativa mensagens de depuração para o driver Zink.
- `MESA_SHADER_CACHE_DISABLE`: Desativa o cache de shaders no Mesa.
- `MESA_SHADER_CACHE_MAX_SIZE`: Define o tamanho máximo do cache de shaders.
- `MESA_GLTHREAD`: Ativa o threading no OpenGL para melhorar o desempenho.
- `WINEESYNC`: Habilita o esync no Wine para melhor gerenciamento de threads.
- `TU_DEBUG`: Ativa mensagens de depuração para o driver Turnip.
- `MESA_VK_WSI_DEBUG`: Ativa depuração para a interface de sistema de janelas no Vulkan.
- `MESA_GL_VERSION_OVERRIDE`: Força uma versão específica do OpenGL.
- `DXVK_HUD`: Exibe informações de desempenho na tela durante a execução.
- `GALLIUM_HUD`: Similar ao DXVK_HUD, mas para drivers Gallium.
- `PULSE_LATENCY_MSEC`: Define a latência do PulseAudio em milissegundos.
- `MESA_EXTENSION_MAX_YEAR`: Restringe as extensões do Mesa a um ano específico.
- `IR3_SHADER_DEBUG`: Ativa depuração para shaders no driver Freedreno.
- `WINE_DO_NOT_CREATE_DXGI_DEVICE_MANAGER`: Impede a criação do gerenciador de dispositivos DXGI no Wine.
- `MANGOHUD`: Ativa a sobreposição do MangoHud para monitoramento de desempenho.

---

### 📥 Instruções de Instalação

1. Instale o APK do **Winlator Brasil 10.1** normalmente no seu dispositivo Android.
2. Execute o aplicativo e aguarde a criação das pastas iniciais.
3. Acesse o menu de gerenciamento de pacotes para alternar ou baixar novas versões do Box64, Turnip ou DXVK.
4. Aplique os templates de controle nas configurações de mapeamento conforme o jogo desejado.

---

### 🛠️ Possíveis Bugs e Melhorias

⚠️ **Instabilidade com Wine 10**: Atualmente, o Wine 10 não é suportado devido a incompatibilidades conhecidas.  
📉 **Limitações de Desempenho**: Alguns dispositivos podem não atingir os 240 FPS devido a restrições de hardware.  
🌐 **Tradução Incompleta**: Apesar de 90% da interface estar traduzida para o português, algumas partes ainda podem aparecer em inglês.

`Obrigado: [afeimod](https://github.com/afeimod/) pelo seu belo trabalho em relação ao menu de drivers.`

Esta versão do **Winlator Brasil 10.0** (fork baseado no projeto de Bruno Dev) inclui uma ampla variedade de versões do **Box64**, **Turnip**, **DXVK** e dezenas de templates de controle otimizados para jogos populares.

---

**NOTA:** Você precisa desinstalar a versão original do Winlator ou Winlator Bionic ou qualquer Winlator associado ao nome do Winlator, se você já o possuía para poder instalar este mod. Ou, caso contrário, você não pode instalar este mod porque este mod é usado glibc e glibc não são suportados o nome personalizado para clonar o apk como benchmark ou qualquer outro nome.

---

**Turnip**:

25.0.0.1, 25.0.0.2, 25.0.0.3, 25.0.0.4, 25.0.0.5,

**DXVK**:

1.10.6.0, 1.10.8.0, 1.13.3, 2.2, 2.2.116, 2.3.1, 2.3.1.54,  
2.4, 2.4.24, 2.4.1, 2.4.1.1, 2.4.1.123, 2.4.1.293,  
2.5.1.2, 2.5.2, 2.5.3.0, 2.6, 2.6.1.1, 2.6.2,  
78.11, 78.9, 78to11, 78to9  

---

## 🎮 Templates de controle incluídos

RTS, Template (12 buttons), Hitman 2, Virtual Gamepad, Fallout 3, Far Cry 4,  
Risen 2, Skyrim, Deus Ex: Human Revolution, Final Fantasy Type-0, Psychonauts,  
Spider-Man: Shattered Dimensions, The Alliance Alive, Mass Effect 2, Alpha Protocol,  
Dark Souls 2, Sonic Generations, Sonic Mania, The Forest, The Saboteur, Ys Origin,  
Ultima Underworld, Bioshock, Driver Parallel Lines, Divinity 2 DC, FlatOut 2,  
Rayman 3, Turok 2, Front Mission Evolved, Gravity Circuit, Metro 2033, NFSMW,  
Marvel Ultimate Alliance, Quake 4, Turok Evolution, Unepic, Untitled Goose Game,  
Infernal, Slime Rancher, SteamWorld Dig 2, IGI 2, RAGE, Oblivion, Drakensang,  
GTA 5, La Mulana, Stalker CS, Sunset Overdrive, Xanadu Next, Cyber Shadow,  
Singularity, Wolfenstein, Prey, Shovel Knight, Second Sight,  
Call of Juarez: Gunslinger, Final Fantasy 8, Star Wars Jedi Knight 2  

---

## 🆕 Changelog

- Inclusão de múltiplas versões do Box64, Turnip e DXVK (pré-instaladas e autônomas);  
- Mais de 50 templates de controle personalizados para jogos;  
- Melhor organização para facilitar atualizações e testes de compatibilidade.

---

## 📌 Instruções de instalação

1. Instale o APK do **Winlator Brasil** normalmente no seu dispositivo Android.  
2. Execute o app e aguarde a criação das pastas iniciais.  
3. Acesse a área de gerenciamento de pacotes para alternar ou baixar novas versões de Box64, Turnip ou DXVK.  
4. Aplique os templates de controle nas configurações de mapeamento conforme o jogo desejado.  

---

## 💾 Acesso ao cartão de memória

Para acessar jogos armazenados no cartão de memória, use o app **"Gerenciador de Arquivos"** (disponível gratuitamente na Play Store).  
Nele, vá até o cartão de memória, toque e mantenha pressionada uma pasta até ela ser selecionada.  
Toque em **"Mais"** (no rodapé), vá em **"Propriedades"** e veja o campo **"Pasta"**, que exibirá o caminho completo, por exemplo:  
`/storage/9BD3-F22E/`  
Copie esse caminho e cole na seção **"Drives"** do container no Winlator.

---

## 🎮 Correção de XInput

Para corrigir possíveis bugs no joystick XInput, acesse o menu:  
**Iniciar > Fixes > XInput Fixes > XInput Fix Controller**

---

⚠️ A estabilidade e o desempenho podem variar conforme o dispositivo e a GPU utilizada.

releases.name: GameNative Performance v1.65
releases.body:
### ✨ What's New

* **Brand New Frontend:** Built from the ground up, complete with full **Controller Compatibility** right out of the gate! 🎮
* **Performance HUD:** Added an in-game HUD to keep an eye on your stats (it's still a WIP, but we're actively making it better). 📊
* **Alsa-Reflector Added:** We pulled in the Coffincolors version, and yes—we *finally* tracked down and fixed that annoying 15-minute audio cutout! 🎧
* **UI Overhaul:** Gave both the Driver UI and the Wine/Proton UI a massive facelift so they feel much better to navigate. 

### 🛠️ Squashed Bugs & Logic Fixes

We spent a lot of time bulletproofing how the system handles Wine and Proton version changes so you don't end up with broken prefixes or stale files. 

* **Smarter Proton Swapping:** Swapping Wine versions actually works the way it should now! The system now properly detects when you boot with a different version and automatically triggers fresh DLL backups, wincomponent reinstalls, and graphics driver re-extractions. 
* **Version Saving Fix:** Fixed a sneaky issue where the new Wine version wasn't actually getting saved to your container extras behind the scenes (which is what was breaking the swap detection in the first place).
* **Steam/Launcher Registry Resets:** We fixed the root cause of Steam/GOG/Epic logins breaking on BIONIC containers. When the registry resets now, we actively clear out the old Steam DLL markers so everything injects cleanly and your login actually restores on the next launch. 
* **No More Stale Files on Save:** As an extra layer of defense, whenever you save your settings with a new Proton version, we now instantly nuke the old `original_dlls` cache and wipe the Steam markers. This guarantees your backups are built fresh from the new version's files. 🧹

Grab the APK below, and let us know how it's running!

releases.name: GameNative Performance v1.02
releases.body:
This update brings critical stability improvements to **Custom Path** functionality and introduces initial support for Surface Format.

## 🛠️ Critical Fixes & Improvements

### Custom Path Logic
* **Downloads:** Fixed an issue where games would not download to the user-defined custom set path.
* **Container Mapping:** Custom paths now correctly map the game subfolder to the `A:` drive for proper mounting.
* **Execution:** Games launched via custom paths now start correctly within the container after installation or being added.
* **Uninstallation:** Deleting a game now correctly removes the specific subfolder instead of leaving residual files.
* **Configuration:** Custom paths can now be added per game.

### General
* **Game Download Manager:** Adjusted connection logic to ensure the manager waits the proper amount of time for Steam to connect before downloading.

## ✨ Quality of Life
* **Surface Format:** Added initial support for Surface Format.

---

### 💬 Feedback
We are constantly fixing issues and adding features based on user feedback.
* Accepting feature requests and bug reports in the **#GameNative** channel on Discord.

releases.name: GameNative Performance v1.01
releases.body: Initial Release based off of the official GameNative but enhanced Quality of Life features have been added and restrictions have been removed!

releases.name: Bringing Legacy Into Today 16
releases.body:
### 3D rendering
* Option to add/remove Reshade from shortcut dialog
* Option to force DXGI at Reshade injection
* Reshade automatic installation for DirectX 9 and higher
* Reshade popular community shaders included
* SBS support for windowed and lower resolution apps

### Bug fixes
* Crash when switching tabs fixed
* Do not load XR on unsupported devices
* Quick menu on Quest bigger
* Unsupported "Big Picture Mode" option removed

### Core
* Allow bigger screen distance
* License into the code added
* Option to support 6GB VRAM
* Select 4GB VRAM by default on container creation
* XR code refactor

### Input
* Decrease latency when typing
* Laser gun option added
* Steering wheel emulation added (experimental)

### UI
* Change tab About to More (containing online info)
* Move Adreno GPU drivers under content tab
* Quck menu rearranged
* Quick menu SBS support
* Relative mouse renamed and moved into Controller Manager
* Show controller manager in quick menu

### XR API 0.4
* Additional screen mode with head tracking
* Map haptics events to bHaptics/ProTube accessory
* Send UDP data on multiple ports

releases.name: Almost Ready to Fly 11
releases.body:
### New UI
* Automatically save container/settings
* Hide touch input controls screen
* Hide unsupported shortcut features
* Quick menu size fixed
* Remember previously opened menu screen
* Updated logo/icon
* Use tabs instead of navigation menu

### XR API 0.3
* AER support added
* Disable head->mouse mapping when UDP is running
* Expose immersive and SBS mode
* Incorrectly rounded negative values fixed
* Increase framesync cache length
* Let user control stereo
* Option to enable UDP communication without VR
* Support higher resolutions

### XR Core
* Autoclose the app when there are no windows
* CPU/GPU level and refresh rate options added
* Decrease XR latency
* Do not allow portrait container resolution
* Shortcut resolution option fixed by @bigelod
* Swapchain indexing fixed

### XR Screen features
* Bloom and fake reflection effects added
* Curved screen support
* Screen effects support in XR mode
* Screen zooming added
* Wideangle screen support

### XR Support
* [Flawless Wide Screen](https://www.flawlesswidescreen.org/)
* [OpenTrack WXR](https://github.com/bigelod/opentrackWXR)

Big thanks to @GmoLargey for testing and reporting many bugs during the development.

releases.name: XrAPI 0.2 support added
releases.body:
